title: athyrium filix-femina subsp. californicum
intro: Athyrium filix-femina subsp. californicum, also known as Lady fern, is a subspecies of fern native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin and internal tissues. The health benefits of Athyrium filix-femina subsp. californicum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote healthy digestion.
